Cloudbeds PMS Integration
🔑 API Configuration

Connect ORAMA to your Cloudbeds PMS to sync live reservations, housekeeping status, and push minibar/F&B charges directly to guest folios.

Manage → Apps & Marketplace → API Credentials → + New Credentials
Visible in your Cloudbeds browser URL when logged in
Paste your Cloudflare Worker URL here for CORS proxy
📋 Required API Scopes

When creating API credentials in Cloudbeds, tick these scopes:

🔄 Manual Sync
Waiting for connection...
🚀 Setup Guide
📤 What Gets Pushed TO Cloudbeds
✅ Mini-bar consumption → Guest folio charge
✅ F&B room service → Guest folio charge
✅ Laundry, spa, activities → Folio
✅ Custom items (damage, etc.)

📥 What Gets Pulled FROM Cloudbeds:
✅ Tonight's occupancy — all villas live
✅ Guest names, check-in/out dates
✅ Reservation source (Booking.com, Direct…)
✅ Housekeeping status per villa
✅ Upcoming arrivals (7-day window)
✅ Property occupancy % & revenue
